title: Subitems Columns
excerpt: Its great that Subitems can have their own column structure that is separate from the parent items on the board. But, why is there not an option to allow the subitems to use the same structure if you choose? Or even bett…

posts.author: Msamuels (Mark Samuels)
posts.cookedHtml: Its great that Subitems can have their own column structure that is separate from the parent items on the board. But, why is there not an option to allow the subitems to use the same structure if you choose? Or even better, select which main item columns you want to be included in the subitems.

posts.author: gblegalco (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! It’s frustrating to have to recreate the columns.
